Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-11-2025 Continued To Aug-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Antigone Skoulas A.K.A. Antigone Skoulas D.D.S. An Individual

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:25 a.m. concluding at 9:27 a.m.

David J. Cook, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., a Delaware Corporation.

No appearance by Defendant Antigone Skoulas A.K.A. Antigone Skoulas D.D.S. An Individual

The court is aware of a pending Bankruptsy matter involving Antigone Skoulas, D.D.S., Inc. that might affect this judgment.

This matter is continued to 8/13/25 at 9:00am in dept. 505 for result of pending bankruptsy or settlement.

Off Calendar Feb-14-2025 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Continued To Feb-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Continued on the court's own motion to February 25, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 301.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC's Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s unopposed application for right to attach order and order for issuance of writ of attachment is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, with a cover letter demonstrating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
